menuItems.name: Wagyu Ribeye Steak
menuItems.description: A 45-day dry-aged premium Wagyu ribeye seared with smoked cherrywood crust, fresh herbs, and gold leaf reduction.

menuItems.name: Lobster Agnolotti
menuItems.description: Handmade pasta stuffed with fresh Maine lobster claws, served in a rich saffron-infused brown butter sauce.

menuItems.name: Crispy Cherrywood Pork Belly
menuItems.description: Slow-roasted pork belly with cherrywood smoke, served over parsnip puree and drizzled with spicy honey gastrique.

menuItems.name: Orange Spiced Soufflé
menuItems.description: Baked to order Grand Marnier orange soufflé, served warm with caramelized orange zest syrup and fresh mint.

menuItems.name: Golden Saffron Calamari
menuItems.description: Crisp hand-cut calamari tossed in saffron salt, served with fresh garlic confit aioli and charred lemon wedges.

menuItems.name: Aged Chocolate Fondant
menuItems.description: Decadent Valrhona dark chocolate cake with a molten center, served with Madagascan vanilla bean ice cream.

menuItems.name: Smoked Amber Old Fashioned
menuItems.description: Premium bourbon whiskey infused with orange peel and local honey, smoked tableside with white oak chips.

reviews.name: Charlotte Dubois
reviews.comment: FlavorNest provided the single best dining experience of my life. The Wagyu Ribeye was seared to absolute perfection, and the tableside Smoked Old Fashioned was theatrical yet sophisticated.

reviews.name: Julian Carter
reviews.comment: Simply outstanding. The attention to detail in the Lobster Agnolotti is remarkable. Elegant casual atmosphere at its absolute finest.

reviews.name: Sophia Rossi
reviews.comment: The Chef's Table reservation is an absolute must-try. Watching the meticulous plating of the pork belly was mesmerizing. Truly culinary art.

reviews.name: Alexander Sterling
reviews.comment: Very professional staff and an atmospheric, gorgeous interior. Perfect location for hosting our corporate dinner clients.

offers.title: Signature Tasting Menu Experience
offers.description: An exclusive 5-course curated journey through our chef's most acclaimed creations. Available Mon-Thu.

offers.title: Intimate Chef's Counter Showcase
offers.description: Reserve a front-row seat to the culinary stage. Includes complementary champagne pairings.
